subject: Electrike, a green dog-like Pokemon with lightning bolt markings, shown in a dynamic running pose amid electric sparks
description: A lean, green dog-like creature with a streamlined body and angular lightning-bolt-like markings is caught mid-stride in a dynamic running pose. Electric sparks and golden-yellow light effects crackle around it. The background glows with warm amber and electric yellow tones suggesting a charged atmosphere. The palette is vivid green and gold-yellow with dark shadow contrasts.
foreground: green dog-like creature running amid electric sparks
background: electric light, amber and yellow glow
